3116300.name: Big City Dreaming
3116300.description:
Big City Dreaming is story based point and click adventure open world visual novel. The game is free to play and nowhere near fully completed but still has plenty of content for you to explore. This is a one man team game and the visuals were created with the use of A.I. image generative tools, that's why it's free to play.

You play as Harry, an aspiring musician who is looking to find his place in the world.

There are plenty of characters to interact with and places to discover as you uncover the secrets of the Big City.

This game was made with the Renpy engine.
3116300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
